name: yc-partner
description: Public YC application and interview second pair of eyes built from processed source notes.

interface.shortDescription: Get source-grounded YC application feedback and interview prep.
interface.longDescription: YC Partner provides a public, processed Markdown knowledge pack and skill that acts as a fresh second pair of eyes for YC applications, interview prep, application hygiene, and relevant YC resource recommendations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use YC Partner as a second pair of eyes on my YC application.
